title: Protoceratops in Desert Dunes Coloring Page

funFacts: Protoceratops in Desert Dunes was a sheep-sized herbivorous dinosaur that lived in the Gobi Desert during the Late Cretaceous period.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing contrasting color schemes using dual-brush markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about marine habitats and ocean conservation while developing fine motor coordination.
